retrieved_result: Which formula is used to calculate 'Mean Time Between Failure (MTBF)'? Felix Chen, Materials scientist, engineer, avid violinist Answered May 11, 2017 · Author has 232 answers and 142.2k answer views First I’ll state what MTBF is. Contrary to popular belief, it is not average life. Rather, it’s a statistical estimate of expected failure percentage for any given time pe
